corrections.current: ἔμβαλε αὐτὸν εἰς ἔργασιαν, ἵνα μὴ ἀργῇ,
corrections.correct: ἔμβαλε αὐτὸν εἰς ἐργασίαν, ἵνα μὴ ἀργῇ,
corrections.note: Printed word is ἐργασίαν with smooth breathing/accent on epsilon, not ἔργασιαν.

notes: Running head and apparatus match the scan. The right-margin line numbers are present in the image but were not transcribed, which is correct. Bottom page number 712 is correctly outside the main transcription.
